race.comment: BLACK STORM (3) will run along from the inside barrier and two back was narrowly beaten over this trip in a 78 at Caulfield. He's won a Bendigo jumpout since last seen, and Michael Rodd is down from Queensland to ride. Suited, and he's going to be tough to peg back.  COUNTY KILKENNY (12) jumped slowly and didn't do a bad job over 1500m in a 66 at Goulburn. Delivered a strong number and will be fitter again. He will sit closer today and Cahill replaces the 2kg apprentice. Each way claims. ASSOCIATE (7) was outgraded at Stakes level in Canberra but his form prior stacks up. Suited over 1600m but he will give away a big start and will need luck. MOSGOLD (6) is fast early and can clear the wide barrier. Bounced straight back winning a 68 over 1400m at Kembla Grange and she can give a sight at a price.
